prompt: [Panoramic View from the Sky] A golden river and the sky of an ancient city. At dusk, overlooking an ancient city in Spain, a flock of wild geese moves toward the western sky. Towers of the city, stone roofs, and hills stretching into the distance. Within the finely drawn scenery, the time of the journey remains as it is. A single white goose mixed in is a small, characteristic marker of this journey.
